creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks. Assigning to committer that resolved.

Also, according to the commit log, jhixson@ is the maintainer? I am assuming Kris knows. If so, John, please sync up your Bugzilla email address with the one used in ports Makefile, which is now john@pcbsd.org. We have no way to track maintainer feedback and involvement unless the addresses are the same. :)
